channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: Coinbase Lays Off 14% of Employees as A.I. Changes Work
item.description: The largest U.S. crypto exchange said it was cutting jobs because of cryptocurrency market volatility and to “optimize” for the artificial intelligence era.
item.dc:creator: Natallie Rocha

media:content.media:credit: Gabby Jones for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Coinbase, which went public in 2021, is cutting 14 percent of its work force.
